creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jilles
Date: Mon Oct 10 20:24:33 UTC 2016
New revision: 307004
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/307004

Log:
  MFC r305676: wait: Do not copyout uninitialized status/rusage/wrusage.

  If wait4() or wait6() return 0 because of WNOHANG, the status, rusage and
  wrusage information should not be returned.

  PR:		212048
  Reported by:	Casey Lucas

Changes:
_U  stable/11/
  stable/11/sys/kern/kern_exit.c
  stable/11/tests/sys/kern/Makefile
  stable/11/tests/sys/kern/waitpid_nohang.c
